name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In the world of Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba, Taishō-era Japan breathes with contrasts, bustling markets by day, haunted forests by night. Demons born from Muzan’s blood prey upon the innocent, opposed only by the Demon Slayer Corps and their mastery of Nichirin blades and Breathing arts. From the harrowing Final Selection to battles with the Twelve Kizuki, every journey is laced with danger and destiny.

Seek the origins of the demons, stand beside the Hashira, or walk a darker road burdened with hunger and power. Whatever path you choose, each decision writes your mark upon a world balanced between hope and despair.

Core Info:

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Final Selection Arc" to the end in "Sunrise Countdown Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 120 characters from across all the anime (and manga i guess...)

(UPDATED) Lorebook Info: 214 Entries = 85.000+ Total Tokens

̶B̶e̶f̶o̶r̶e̶:̶ ̶1̶8̶4̶ ̶E̶n̶t̶r̶i̶e̶s̶ ̶=̶ ̶7̶5̶.̶0̶0̶0̶+̶ ̶T̶o̶t̶a̶l̶ ̶t̶o̶k̶e̶n̶s̶

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL.

Core History

Pre-Series Backstory

Centuries before the main story, Muzan Kibutsuji becomes the first demon after a failed medical treatment, cursing him with a need for human blood. The Ubuyashiki family forms the Demon Slayer Corps to combat demons. Yoriichi Tsugikuni creates Sun Breathing and nearly defeats Muzan, but is banished for failing to kill him. The Kamado family’s connection to Sun Breathing begins, setting the stage for Tanjiro’s journey.

Final Selection Arc

Tanjiro Kamado trains under Sakonji Urokodaki, mastering Water Breathing and cutting a massive boulder to qualify for the Final Selection. He survives the demon-infested forest, defeats the vengeful Hand Demon, and earns his place in the Demon Slayer Corps, beginning his quest to save his sister Nezuko.

Kidnapper’s B
creator: WnMinoru
